productDisplayName: Nike Women Ten Blue White Shoe
description: Look cool and on-trend for your next casual outing in these Tenkay slip-ons from nike. The dainty ballet shoe design gets an urban vibe with the flexible rubber outsole. Team these with short denim skirts or shorts and tees for a crisp, clean look.Upper Elastic mouth shoe with fabric uppers and synthetic suede overlays Ankle strap with velcro closure for a snug Fit Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for easy 180 degree movement Deep flex grooves for bending, twisting and changing direction Shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
